details: Bucket allows public read access and may expose sensitive media assets.
recommended_action: Block public access, review bucket policy, and confirm intended sharing settings.
Restrict SSH to approved admin IP ranges or remove external access.

details: Service account has broad project-level permissions beyond its job function.
recommended_action: Reduce role scope according to least privilege and review account usage.

details: TCP/3389 is exposed publicly, increasing remote access risk.
recommended_action: Limit RDP access to trusted IP space or remove public exposure entirely.
